cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my younger brother, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: do1 goek3 sin1 saang1
cards.english: [Mr. Manylegs]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: Peppa玩緊佢間玩具屋，George都一齊玩
cards.jyutping: waan2 gan2 keoi5 gaan1 waan2 geoi6 uk1 dou1 jat1 cai4 waan2
cards.english: Peppa is playing with her dollhouse, and George is playing with her too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: wai6 gung1 zai2 jat1 gaa1 jan4 hoi1 caa4 wui6
cards.english: Peppa is holding a tea party for the doll family.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: lai4 aa1
cards.english: Come on, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 我嚟扮爹哋媽咪，你就扮細路吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 lai4 baan6 de1 dei6 maa1 mi4 nei5 zau6 baan6 sai3 lou6 aa1
cards.english: I'll pretend to be Daddy and Mommy, and you pretend to be the kids.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 細路，差唔多飲下午茶啦
cards.jyutping: sai3 lou6 caa1 m4 do1 jam2 haa6 ng5 caa4 laa1
cards.english: Kids, it's almost time for afternoon tea.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 heoi3 sai2 sau2 sin1 laa1
cards.english: You guys go wash your hands first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zoeng1 loeng5 go3 sai3 lou6 fong3 soeng6 cong4
cards.english: George puts the two kids to bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2
cards.english: Goodnight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: George，點解你將兩個細路放上牀度㗎？
cards.jyutping: dim2 gaai2 nei5 zoeng1 loeng5 go3 sai3 lou6 fong3 soeng5 cong4 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: George, why did you put the two kids in bed?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 jiu3 hoi1 caa4 wui6 aa3
cards.english: They have to have a tea party.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 fong3 gung1 zai2 soeng5 cong4
cards.english: George really likes putting the dolls to bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 細路，你兩個即刻攞嚟啊
cards.jyutping: sai3 lou6 nei5 loeng5 go3 zik1 hak1 lo2 lai4 aa3
cards.english: Kids, you two come here right now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 zau6 mou5 daan6 gou1 sik6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Otherwise, you won't get any cake.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: jyun4 cyun4 mou5 ting3 dou3
cards.english: George doesn't hear at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 佢望住暗兩個細路瞓覺
cards.jyutping: keoi5 mong6 zyu6 am3 loeng5 go3 sai3 lou6 fan3 gaau3
cards.english: He watches the two children sleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: George，如果你想玩我個玩具屋
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 soeng2 waan2 ngo5 go3 waan2 geoi6 uk1
cards.english: George, if you want to play with my dollhouse,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zau6 jiu3 bong1 sau2 zeon2 bei6 caa4 wui6
cards.english: you need to help prepare the tea party.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: lai4 aa1
cards.english: Come on, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你去斟啲水落個茶壺度吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 heoi3 zam1 di1 seoi2 lok6 go3 caa4 wu2 dou6 aa1
cards.english: Go pour some water into the teapot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 細路，你兩個即刻攞嚟啊
cards.jyutping: sai3 lou6 nei5 loeng5 go3 zik1 hak1 lo2 lai4 aa3
cards.english: Kids, get over here right now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 lai4 laa3
cards.english: Mommy, we're coming.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 zam1 seoi2 jap6 caa4 wu2 dou6
cards.english: George is going to pour water into the teapot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: George喺洗手盆度見到隻蜘蛛
cards.jyutping: hai2 sai2 sau2 pun4 dou6 gin3 dou2 zek3 zi1 zyu1
cards.english: George saw a spider in the sink.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: soeng2 tung4 zi1 zyu1 zou6 pang4 jau5
cards.english: George wants to be friends with the spider.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 zek3 zi1 zyu1
cards.english: George really likes the spider.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zi1 zyu1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 wo3
cards.english: The spider likes George too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hoi1 caa4 wui6
cards.english: Peppa really likes having tea parties.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 嗰啲朱古力餅喺邊啊？爹哋
cards.jyutping: go2 di1 zyu1 gu1 lik1 beng2 hai2 bin1 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Where are those chocolate biscuits, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: cam4 jat6 zung6 jau5 hou2 do1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: There were still a lot yesterday.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: juk1 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Oh, I'm sorry, Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: jing1 goi1 hai6 bei2 ngo5 sik6 saai3 laa3
cards.english: I probably ate them all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zan1 hai6 jai6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy is so naughty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zoeng1 zek3 zi1 zyu1 fong3 soeng5 cong4
cards.english: George puts the spider on the bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2
cards.english: Good night.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai2 dou6 zou6 gan2 me1 aa3
cards.english: George, what are you doing?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你應該幫我開茶會至啱㗎
cards.jyutping: nei5 jing1 goi1 bong1 ngo5 hoi1 caa4 wui6 zi3 ngaam1 gaa4
cards.english: You should be helping me set up the tea party.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: gau3 meng6 aa3
cards.english: Help!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我間睡房有蜘蛛啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 gaan1 seoi6 fong2 jau5 zi1 zyu1 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, there's a spider in my bedroom!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 daam1 sam1 wo3
cards.english: Don't worry, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 爹哋，求下你吖，快啲拎走佢
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 kau4 haa6 nei5 aa1 faai3 di1 ling1 zau2 keoi5
cards.english: Daddy, please, take it away quickly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 daam1 sam1 wo3
cards.english: Don't worry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: hou2 maa1
cards.english: Okay? George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: jau5 mou5 gin3 dou2 zek3 zi1 zyu1 aa3
cards.english: Can you see the spider?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 taai3 hung2 bou3 laa3
cards.english: It's too scary.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: ling1 zau2 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: Take it away!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: gan1 bun2 zau6 m4 seoi1 jiu3 ging1 gaa4
cards.english: There's really no need to be scared, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 所有蜘蛛都係好細隻，而且傷害唔到你㗎
cards.jyutping: so2 jau5 zi1 zyu1 dou1 hai6 hou2 sai3 zek3 ji4 ce2 soeng1 hoi6 m4 dou3 nei5 gaa4
cards.english: All spiders are very small and can't hurt you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 不過唔使擔心，爹哋會搦走佢㗎喇
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 m4 sai2 daam1 sam1 de1 dei6 wui6 nik1 zau2 keoi5 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: But don't worry, Daddy will get rid of it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: waa1 keoi5 hou2 daai6 zek3 wo3 hai6 maa1
cards.english: Wow, it's very big, isn't it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 誒…我而家去叫埋媽咪嚟吖
cards.jyutping: aai2 ngo5 ji4 gaa1 heoi3 giu3 maai4 maa1 mi4 lai4 aa1
cards.english: Uh... I'm going to go get Mommy now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 aa1
cards.english: Mommy!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Hello there, Mr. Manylegs.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: gok3 dak1 mou5 gam3 ging1 laa3
cards.english: Peppa, do you feel less scared now?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你好鍾意我間玩具屋呀？
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 zung1 ji3 ngo5 haan4 wun6 geoi6 uk1 aa1
cards.english: You really like my dollhouse, huh?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hou2 maa1
cards.english: How are you doing?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 聽講你哋揾到隻蜘蛛仔喎
cards.jyutping: teng1 gong2 nei5 dei6 wan2 dou3 zek3 zi1 zyu1 zai2 wo3
cards.english: I heard you found a little spider.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 我嚟拎走佢，等你哋可以繼續玩啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 lai4 ling1 zau2 keoi5 dang2 nei5 dei6 ho2 ji5 gai3 zuk6 waan2 laa1
cards.english: I'll take him away so you can continue playing.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 媽咪，佢個名係叫做多腳先生啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 keoi5 go3 ming4 hai6 giu3 zou6 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, his name is Mr. Manylegs.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 多腳先生，你都幾大隻喎
cards.jyutping: do1 goek3 sin1 saang1 nei5 dou1 gei2 daai6 zek3 wo3
cards.english: Mr. Manylegs, you're quite big.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 zek3 zi1 zyu1
cards.english: Peppa and George really like the spider.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2
cards.english: Goodnight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zoeng1 zi1 zyu1 fong3 soeng5 cong4
cards.english: George puts the spider on the bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: m4 dak1 aa3
cards.english: No, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 soeng2 jam2 caa4 aa3
cards.english: He wants to have tea.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 佢而家都仲未想瞓覺㗎
cards.jyutping: keoi5 ji4 gaa1 dou1 zung6 mei6 soeng2 fan3 gaau3 gaa4
cards.english: He still doesn't want to sleep yet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你係咪好肚餓啊？多腳先生
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai6 mai6 hou2 tou5 ngo6 aa3 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Are you very hungry, Mr. Manylegs?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 sik6 daan6 gou1 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to eat cake?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: Peppa已經完全唔驚隻蜘蛛喇
cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 jyun4 cyun4 m4 ging1 zek3 zi1 zyu1 laa3
cards.english: Peppa is not scared of the spider at all anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 de1 dei6 co5 dai1 aa1
cards.english: Mommy, Daddy, sit down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 我哋要一齊同多腳先生飲下午茶
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jiu3 jat1 cai4 tung4 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1 jam2 haa6 ng5 caa4
cards.english: We want to have afternoon tea with Mr. Manylegs together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: bin1 go3 jiu3 jam2 caa4 aa3
cards.english: Who wants to have tea?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 aa1 m4 goi1 ngo5 jiu3 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: - I want some, please. - I want some, please.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: It's really delicious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hoi1 caa4 wui6
cards.english: Peppa loves having tea parties.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 呢杯茶係你嘅，多腳先生
cards.jyutping: ne1 bui1 caa4 hai6 nei5 ge3 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This cup of tea is for you, Mr. Manylegs.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 waa6 me1 waa6
cards.english: What did you say?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你想同我爹哋打個招呼呀？
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 tung4 ngo5 de1 dei6 daa2 go3 ziu1 fu1 aa1
cards.english: Do you want to say hello to my Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Hello, Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 haak3 hei3 laa3
cards.english: No need to be so cordial, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.characters: 你畀多腳先生返去飲茶啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 bei2 do1 goek3 sin1 saang1 faan1 heoi3 jam2 caa4 laa1
cards.english: Let Mr. Manylegs go back and drink tea.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 hai6 paa3 zo2 keoi5 aa6 maa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: You're not scared of him, are you, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E47 Mr. Skinnylegs［多腳先生］
